code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test06-APR-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low CO₂, and significant proteinuria, suggesting possible renal dysfunction. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, high protein, bilirubin, and ketones) further support renal impairment and possible hepatic involvement. Low HbA1c may indicate recent changes in glucose metabolism. Recommend further nephrological and hepatic evaluation and correlation with clinical findings.
